text: This study aims to describe the implementation of religious character education program at MI Nurul Yaqin Surabaya and to know the tangible effects of the program on the students’ life. This study uses descriptive qualitative research method. The data were collected by means of instrument in the form of deep interview, field observation, and documentation. The results of the study show that the Religious Character Education Program in MI Nurul Yaqin Surabaya has been arranged systematically and has undergone implementation in accordance with the plan, but still needs improvement. Therefore, the madrasa is suggested to conduct a study on the implementation of the program periodically, to carry out teacher training aimed at enhancing teacher’s pedagogical skills, and to strengthen the communication with parents in order to fortify religious value implanted in the students. Thus, the implementation of character education program at MI Nurul Yaqin Surabaya is expected to achieve the planned goals and to produce students with global excellence.
